NON-PAYING INACTIVE Canadian marine dealer (active=false, isProspect=false, Huntsville ON). Per Chip's mandate not skip-listing; needs Pulkit/Abhi to check scraping-server logs for the actual fetch failure (axios timeout vs 403 vs empty body) and possibly add a server-side debug trace, OR a custom scrape.do tier without geoCode pinning. 7-day recheck.
